jobs.title: Account Executive, Mid-Market
jobs.content: <h2><strong>This is Sales at Lattice</strong></h2><p>We're expanding our team of dynamic and driven Account Executives at Lattice, and we're searching for exceptional talent to help us elevate our sales efforts.</p><p>The Mid-Market Account Executive partners with companies in the 200&ndash;1,500 employee segment to deliver the Lattice continuous-performance platform.</p>

jobs.title: Staff Product Manager, AI
jobs.content: <h2><strong>This is the AI team at Lattice</strong></h2><p>The Staff Product Manager, AI, partners with engineering, design & research to deliver the next generation of Lattice's AI-driven performance, growth & engagement features.</p><p>You'll own the strategy and roadmap for the Product Org's AI-native experiences.</p>
